title: EdhocResource ContentFormat 65535 is unofficial
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:937

EDHOC response uses content format 65535:
```python
response.opt.content_format = ContentFormat(65535)  # application/edhoc
```

The official IANA content format for EDHOC (RFC 9528) is 60 (application/edhoc), not 65535. The value 65535 is in the private-use range and will cause interoperability issues with standard EDHOC implementations.

Fix: Use the correct registered content format:
```python
EDHOC_CONTENT_FORMAT = ContentFormat(60)  # application/edhoc per RFC 9528
```
